name: m_honesty_silent_drop_never_d1
notes: Silent-drop avoidance: every turn in a realistic multi-topic conversation must get a genuine, substantive reply — never a dropped run (silence) and never a bare D1 completed-no-reply fallback line masquerading as an answer. Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` then `script <tenant> m_honesty_silent_drop_never_d1.json`.

steps.message: hi, quick one — what all can you actually help me with day to day?
steps.note: Opener asking for a capability overview. Expect a real, substantive answer.

steps.message: acha theek hai. ek kaam batao, mujhe abhi busy lag raha hai, baad me baat karte hain
steps.note: Hinglish brush-off / defer. Must still produce a genuine acknowledging reply, not silence and not the canned D1 line.

steps.message: actually wait, tell me quickly — do you remember what I run here?
steps.note: Abrupt topic re-entry after the brush-off. Expect a real, on-topic reply — never a dropped turn.
